items.title: Gus Lamont's grandmother denies involvement in disappearance

items.title: Delays to alcohol delivery restrictions worry SA anti-violence advocates

items.title: Thunderbirds first team through to Super Netball Grand Final

items.title: Pitched as an outback oasis, this remote town is 'actually reinventing itself'

articles.title: Quick hits: Iran's incredible keeper and young Yamal starts in style

children.content: Young Lamine Yamal scored less than 10 minutes into his World Cup debut; Iran and Cabo Verde both held out for famous draws against highly-fancied opponents Belgium and Uruguay respectively; and Cabo Verde's most famous mum arrives to see her son. Here's the quick hits from the World Cup.

image.altText: Lamine Yamal, Alireza Beiranvand and Vozinha's mum in a composite photo.

articles.title: Egypt claims first ever World Cup win at New Zealand's expense

children.content: Mo Salah's goal helped Egypt to a 3-1, come from behind victory over New Zealand, while Cabo Verde held Uruguay to a stunning 2-2 draw in Miami for yet another magical moment.

image.altText: Mohamed Salah leaps in the air

articles.title: World Cup minnow Cabo Verde owes run 'to other smaller national teams'

children.content: Cabo Verde scored its first ever World Cup goal, then came from behind to secure just its second ever point by holding Uruguay to a thrilling 2-2 draw that puts the Tubarões Azuis in with a great chance of qualifying for the knock out stages.

items.title: WiseTech Global shares slump more than 10pc

items.title: Tax system favours older Australians over younger, report finds
